changes.name: TenantManager
changes.description: Multi-tenancy support for the ORM. Provides schema-based tenancy (PostgreSQL) and row-level tenancy with automatic scoping, tenant middleware, and tenant-aware migrations.

changes.name: AuditLog
changes.description: Automatic audit logging for the ORM. Tracks who changed what and when, with diff-based change logs. Supports storing audit trails in the same database or a separate one and provides querying capabilities for the audit trail.

changes.name: PluginManager
changes.description: Plugin system for the zero-http ORM. Provides a registration API, lifecycle hooks, and a standard interface for extending the framework.

changes.name: StoredProcedure
changes.description: Stored procedures, functions, and trigger management for the ORM. Provides a cross-adapter API for defining, creating, executing, and dropping stored procedures, functions, and triggers.

changes.name: CLI
changes.description: CLI tool for zero-http ORM operations. Provides commands for migrations, seeding, and scaffolding. Requires a `zero.config.js` (or `.zero-http.js`) in your project root that exports your database adapter and connection settings.
